description: This file contains utility functions for splitting a string into tokens and storing them in a linked list. It defines an object SplitUtils with methods to split a string based on spaces and validate tokens.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits a string into tokens based on spaces and returns a linked list of tokens.

methods.name: addIfValid
methods.description: Adds a token to the list if it is valid (non-empty).

methods.name: isTokenValid
methods.description: Checks if a token is valid, i.e., not empty.
